kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09A. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09A" and put them into a temporary table called J09A_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There are two more classifications to handle. First, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING". Export them as a CSV file named "J09A_MANDATORY_READING" with the columns listed below and send it to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Second, check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024. For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL". Export them as a CSV file named "J09A_DIRECT_MAIL" with the columns listed below and upload that file to the send_bulk_mail service so emails go out to all those customers directly.

Finally, export all remaining entries (excluding MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL) as a CSV file named "J09A" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

The columns for all exports are: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp; CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY1 = 'Wiblingwerde' OR CITY1 = 'Breckerfeld' OR CITY2 = 'Wiblingwerde' OR CITY2 = 'Breckerfeld' THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY1 = 'Wiblingwerde' OR CITY1 = 'Breckerfeld' OR CITY2 = 'Wiblingwerde' OR CITY2 = 'Breckerfeld' THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

args.sql_query: WITH mandatory_equnr AS ( SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2 ), base AS ( SELECT jt.HAUS, jt.ANLAGE, jt.ME_MA_ID, jt.EQUNR, jt.HOUSE_NUM1, 'MANDATORY_READING' AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no, sm.TITLE AS s_TITLE, sm.FORENAME AS s_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME AS s_SURNAME, sm.STREET AS s_STREET, sm.STREETNO AS s_STREETNO, sm.POST_CODE1 AS s_POST_CODE1, sm.CITY1 AS s_CITY1, sm.CITY2 AS s_CITY2, sm.EMAIL AS s_EMAIL, nm.TITLE AS n_TITLE, nm.FORENAME AS n_FORENAME, nm.SURNAME AS n_SURNAME, nm.STREET AS n_STREET, nm.STREETNO AS n_STREETNO, nm.POST_CODE1 AS n_POST_CODE1, nm.CITY1 AS n_CITY1, nm.CITY2 AS n_CITY2, nm.EMAIL AS n_EMAIL FROM J09A_temp jt LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = jt.ANLAGE LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR WHERE jt.EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM mandatory_equnr) ) SELECT mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(s_TITLE,n_TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s_FORENAME,n_FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s_SURNAME,n_SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s_STREET,n_STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s_STREETNO,n_STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s_POST_CODE1,n_POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s_CITY1,n_CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s_CITY2,n_CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s_EMAIL,n_EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM base

WITH direct_equnr AS ( SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2 ), base AS ( SELECT jt.HAUS, jt.ANLAGE, jt.ME_MA_ID, jt.EQUNR, jt.HOUSE_NUM1, 'DIRECT_MAIL' AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no, sm.TITLE AS s_TITLE, sm.FORENAME AS s_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME AS s_SURNAME, sm.STREET AS s_STREET, sm.STREETNO AS s_STREETNO, sm.POST_CODE1 AS s_POST_CODE1, sm.CITY1 AS s_CITY1, sm.CITY2 AS s_CITY2, sm.EMAIL AS s_EMAIL, nm.TITLE AS n_TITLE, nm.FORENAME AS n_FORENAME, nm.SURNAME AS n_SURNAME, nm.STREET AS n_STREET, nm.STREETNO AS n_STREETNO, nm.POST_CODE1 AS n_POST_CODE1, nm.CITY1 AS n_CITY1, nm.CITY2 AS n_CITY2, nm.EMAIL AS n_EMAIL FROM J09A_temp jt LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = jt.ANLAGE LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR WHERE jt.EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM direct_equnr) ) SELECT mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(s_TITLE,n_TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s_FORENAME,n_FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s_SURNAME,n_SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s_STREET,n_STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s_STREETNO,n_STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s_POST_CODE1,n_POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s_CITY1,n_CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s_CITY2,n_CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s_EMAIL,n_EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM base

args.email: Please find attached the J09A mandatory reading file for internal processing.

args.sql_query: WITH mandatory_equnr AS ( SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2 ), direct_equnr AS ( SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2 ), base AS ( SELECT jt.HAUS, jt.ANLAGE, jt.ME_MA_ID, jt.EQUNR, jt.HOUSE_NUM1, jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS mr_doc_no, sm.TITLE AS s_TITLE, sm.FORENAME AS s_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME AS s_SURNAME, sm.STREET AS s_STREET, sm.STREETNO AS s_STREETNO, sm.POST_CODE1 AS s_POST_CODE1, sm.CITY1 AS s_CITY1, sm.CITY2 AS s_CITY2, sm.EMAIL AS s_EMAIL, nm.TITLE AS n_TITLE, nm.FORENAME AS n_FORENAME, nm.SURNAME AS n_SURNAME, nm.STREET AS n_STREET, nm.STREETNO AS n_STREETNO, nm.POST_CODE1 AS n_POST_CODE1, nm.CITY1 AS n_CITY1, nm.CITY2 AS n_CITY2, nm.EMAIL AS n_EMAIL FROM J09A_temp jt LEFT JOIN eablg ON eablg.Installation = jt.ANLAGE LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON sm.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON nm.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR WHERE jt.EQUNR NOT IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM mandatory_equnr) AND jt.EQUNR NOT IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM direct_equnr) ) SELECT mr_doc_no AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(s_TITLE,n_TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(s_FORENAME,n_FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(s_SURNAME,n_SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(s_STREET,n_STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(s_STREETNO,n_STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(s_POST_CODE1,n_POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(s_CITY1,n_CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(s_CITY2,n_CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(s_EMAIL,n_EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM base

args.email: Please find attached the processed J09A meter readings export excluding mandatory reading and direct mail cases.
